description: A reliability engineer plans and reviews the results of a non-destructive testing (NDT) inspection on a dragline boom to check for cracks.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a third-party NDT contractor to perform an ultrasonic inspection on the critical welds of the dragline boom.

expected_outcome.expected: The inspection is scheduled in the maintenance plan.

nodes.task_description: Receive the inspection report from the contractor.

expected_outcome.expected: The NDT report is received and uploaded into the CMMS.

nodes.task_description: Review the report, which indicates a small crack has been found. Create a high-priority work order for a certified welder to grind out and repair the crack.

expected_outcome.expected: The report is reviewed, and a repair work order is created to address the defect before it can grow.
